Diane E. Pritchard, Esq. of Vogl Meredit Burke LLP (415.398.0200) appearing for SAN FRANCISCO CONSERVATION CORPS, defendant / opposing party

RULING - A R G U E D: Plaintiff SHIRLEY POWELL'S Motion of Joint Submission Regarding Production of Documents; Joint Submission is ordered continued to JULY 26, 2013 at 9:00AM for further hearing. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn Of Joint Submission Regarding Production Of Documents; Joint Submission
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Continued To Jun-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff SHIRLEY POWELL'S Motion of Joint Submission Regarding Production of Documents; Joint Submission is continued to June 10, 2013 to give all parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The parties must deliver courtesy copies of all papers filed in support of and opposition to the motion to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 30, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
